Assignment For Session 4:
The 3-Tip Loop


1. Using The Tip Formula below and The 3-Tip Loop (also below), create your 3 tips (avoid, enjoy and how-to) and put them into the Tip Loop Sequence:  Open How-To Tip Loop, Avoid Tip, Enjoy Tip, Close How-To Tip Loop.

The Tip Formula
The Benefit
Why Do It?
What Is It?
How To Do It
The Result
The Mini Dream Story

Part 1: Open The Loop
1. What is the Primary Benefit(s) of your How-To Tip? This should be your USPs Primary Benefit, with a secondary benefit if needed.
(Example: The tip I'm about to share with you will empower you to lose more weight while you sleep, and give you more energy…)

Your How-To Tip Benefit(s):

WRITE IT HERE:

2. Why should your reader do your How-To Tip?
(Example: This makes losing weight easier for you to do… and increased the energy will let you enjoy your family life more...)

Your How-To Tip Reasons Why:

WRITE IT HERE: 

3. What is your specific How-To Tip?
(Example: Here's what you do: You consume three specific foods at your last two meals.)

Your What Is It Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE: 

4. Open The Loop for your How-To Tip.
(Example: I'll explain exactly which foods and how to do this in just a few minutes… but FIRST...)

Your Open Loop Sentenceundefinedundefinedundefined:

WRITE IT HERE: 


Part 2: Avoid Tip

1. What is the Primary Benefit(s) of your Avoid Tip?
(Example: I need to warn you about the top three foods you absolutely must avoid if you want to drop weight faster…these are foods you are probably eating and THINK they are healthy weight loss foods, and if you avoid them, you'll enjoy FASTER weight loss...)

Your Avoid Tip Benefit(s):

WRITE IT HERE:


2. Why should your reader do your Avoid Tip?
(Example: If you want to remove these tricky "healthy" roadblocks to weight loss AND burn fat faster, you simply must do this:)

Your Avoid Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE: 

3. What is your specific Avoid Tip?
(Example: You MUST avoid eating any bread, even healthy bread, any form of rice, and any form of yellow vegetables after 6:00 PM.)

Your Specific Avoid Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE:

4. How does your reader do your Avoid Tip?
(Example: The way you pull this off is simple: First, eat your starches earlier in the day… This will help you do without at night… Second, consume more protein and slightly more dietary fat later in the day… this keeps your blood sugar stable, and you'll cut your cravings for carbs at night…Finally, treat yourself every 3rd day with your favorite carb food… more about how to do that in a moment, so keep watching this video!...)

Your How To Do It Avoid Tip Instructions:

WRITE IT HERE:

5. What are the Results of applying your Avoid Tip?
(Example: Once you being eating like this, consuming your carbs only early in the day, you'll begin dropping your belly fat faster…your energy levels will soar…your metabolism will increase, so you burn more fat around the clock, and you'll never suffer from those nasty early evening energy dips ever again!...)

Your Results From Your Avoid Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:

6. What will your reader's Dream Story look like from this Avoid Tip?
(Example: Just imagine: Your cravings are gone, especially at night…and your energy is so awesome that you HAVE to move more!)

Your Reader's Dream Story From The Avoid Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:


Part 3: Enjoy Tip

1. What is the Primary Benefit(s) of your Enjoy Tip?
(Example: Now, here's another tip: It's how I learned to actually ENJOY my diet and actually make it FUN...)

Your Enjoy Tip Benefit(s):

WRITE IT HERE:


2. Why should your reader do your Avoid Tip?
(Example: Let's face facts: If you enjoy your diet, you're going to effortlessly stay on it, right? That means long-term weight loss success, and the end of yo-yo dieting!...)

Your Enjoy Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE: 

3. What is your specific Enjoy Tip?
(Example: Here's the trick: Write down your Top 20 favorite healthy, lean foods. Sure, I want you to eat your favorite foods, and you will, but everyone has at least 20 foods they really like that are good for your waistline… what are yours?... Write them down… then refuse to eat anything that's not on that list!)

Your Specific Enjoy Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE:

4. How does your reader do your Enjoy Tip?
(Example: I'm not suggesting you only eat 20 foods… rather, you need to make a list of 20 foods you KNOW you enjoy eating that's good for your waistline… foods like lean meats, whole grains, fruits, green vegetables you enjoy, salads, and so on. Just write them all down and create your own personal "food bible"… and hey, if broccoli isn't on the list you never have to eat it… This way every meal you eat will become a treat you look forward to…)

Your How To Do It Enjoy Tip Instructions:

WRITE IT HERE:

5. What are the Results of applying your Enjoy Tip?
(Example: Do this, and you'll feel more control and more freedom than you've ever experienced when it comes to weight loss!...)

Your Results From Your Enjoy Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:

6. What will your reader's Dream Story look like from this Enjoy Tip?
(Example: Can you see yourself enjoying every meal…and really looking forward to enjoying that favorite foods meal coming up right around the corner?...)

Your Reader's Dream Story From The Enjoy Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:
Part 4: Close Loop And Create How-To Tip

1. Start Closing The How-To Loop You Opened In Part 1
(Example: Okay… remember those three specific foods I mentioned earlier?... and how they can help you lose weight while you sleep?...)

Your Starting Loop Close:

WRITE IT HERE:


2. What is the Primary Benefit(s) of your How-To Tip?
(Example: Let me tell you: If you do not do this, all the other tips are really worthless...This tip is THAT important for your permanent weight loss, so really pay attention:)

Your How-To Tip Benefit(s):

WRITE IT HERE:


3. Why should your reader do your How-To Tip?
(Example: There is nothing more empowering… more freeing… than knowing exactly what and when to eat… never having to guess or worry about if you have it 'right' or not… so let's put an end to that worry right now:)

Your How-To Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE: 

4. What is your specific How-To Tip?
(Example: Ready? I want you to fill ½ of your dinner plate with anything green, other than a fruit. Then, fill ¼ of your plate with any lean protein, like chicken, tofu, turkey, or fish. Finally, fill the remaining ¼ of your plate with non-fat or low-fat plain yogurt…)

Your Specific How-To Tip Reasons:

WRITE IT HERE:

5. How does your reader do your How-To Tip?
(Example: This food combination trigger what I call Metabolic and Digestive Thermogenesis™…This is a state where your body is forced into hyper-fat-burning mode… now, there are several other foods you need to combine just like this combination to burn even more fat… and you absolutely must eat your favorite junk food meals at least twice a week… you just have to do it on specific days, and at a specific time… I'm about to show you how…)

Your How To Do The How-To Tip Instructions:

WRITE IT HERE:

6. What are the Results of applying your How-To Tip?
(Example: This is your ticket out of EVER feeling restricted on a diet plan… of EVER feeling like you can't go out and be a normal person with a normal social life and still lose weight… and a way for you to permanently enjoy your weight loss plan, because you get to eat foods you like every day, plus foods you love several times a week… all while the Metabolic and Digestive Thermogenesis Strategy kicks in and boosts your fat-burning through the roof!...)

Your Results From Your How-To Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:

7. What will your reader's Dream Story look like from this How-To Tip?
(Example: Imagine your life and your freedom as you simply eat your way thin… and you love every single moment of it… doesn't that feel absolutely awesome?... And wouldn't you love to get started today… right now… and start watching more pounds come off, faster than ever before?...)

Your Reader's Dream Story From The Enjoy Tip Here:

WRITE IT HERE:


Tip Notes

Never use your primary business model or service as a tip.
Always pull a segment out of your model/product to use as a tip, but never use your main service or offering as a tip.

2. Think in terms of the benefits to your reader. 

3. What are your reader's greatest needs and desires? Ask them if you can. Write down the top 10 mistakes they make, and form your avoid tips around that. Write down what they would LOVE to see happen, and create your enjoy tip from that. Save your best "linchpin" tip for last: Your How-To tip, which leads into your product pitch.

4. Do not be afraid to give away killer information! Remember, your reader will assume you have a lot more information where that came from. Over-deliver on tips, and you'll create a viral, affiliate-friendly VSL!
